form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation when last of 9 at Rosehill Bm78 November 8 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Yes Lulu with 59.5kg at $3.60. Previously first up; third in a small field at Canterbury Cg&E Bm72 September 10 over 1250m, in the wet; 0.9 len behind Silentsar with 61kg at $3.90. Looks ready to make an immediate impact.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.5 len at Randwick Kensington Bm78 March 25 over 1150m in soft going defeating Grand Prairie carrying 53kg at $2.60. Before that favourite; won by 1.0 len at Rosehill Cg&E Mdn-Sw February 25 over 1200m defeating Maidoff carrying 58.5kg at $1.55. Progressing well and is the one they have to beat.
